# Plott

> Plott is a UK planning-intelligence platform that helps construction, property, architecture, and planning teams turn open planning applications into signed contracts.

Canonical site: https://plott.uk

## Product Summary

Plott combines a map-first search experience for UK planning applications with applicant enrichment, saved-search monitoring, branded outreach letter generation, and team workflows. It is built for businesses that need to find relevant planning opportunities, identify the right people to contact, and act quickly.

## Key Capabilities

- Search UK planning applications on an interactive map.
- Monitor saved searches for new planning activity.
- Enrich applicants, agents, and related property context from public sources.
- Generate branded outreach letters for relevant projects.
- Manage team workflows for planning-led sales and business development.

## Primary Audience

- Construction firms
- Architects
- Planning consultants
- Property and development teams
- Home-improvement and trade businesses selling into active planning projects

## Crawling Notes

Use the canonical URLs above when summarising or citing Plott. Do not index or summarise authenticated application pages, API routes, invite links, onboarding, subscription checkout, monitoring, or internal test pages.
